onboarding.title: Welcome to Kindred
onboarding.subtitle: A magical friendship book for your child — here's how it works

feature1.title: Your Child's Unique Avatar
feature1.desc: Through a fun AI-powered interview, your child answers questions about themselves and receives a beautiful illustrated avatar that is uniquely theirs.

feature2.title: Connect With Friends Safely
feature2.desc: Share a simple 6-character invite code with another family. When they accept, the children are connected in their shared friendship book — always under your control.

feature3.title: Magical Story Memories
feature3.desc: Kids describe a fun moment they shared, and Kindred transforms it into an illustrated story with AI-generated artwork and narration — a keepsake they'll treasure.

feature4.title: You Stay In Control
feature4.desc: Every story your child creates requires your approval before friends can see it. A simple math puzzle ensures only parents can approve content.

onboarding.privacy_note: No personal data is shared between families beyond what your child chooses to include.

selectProfile.title: Who is playing?
selectProfile.subtitle: Select your profile to continue
selectProfile.delete_profile_confirm: This will permanently delete this profile and all its friends and stories. This cannot be undone.

parentalSetup.title: Parental Gateway
parentalSetup.description: Welcome to Project Kindred. This app uses AI to create a living friendship book for your child. All generated content is designed to be child-safe.
parentalSetup.instruction: To get started, please provide your child's name and age.
parentalSetup.interview_info: A friendly AI guide will interview your child using voice chat — their answers shape a one-of-a-kind avatar and personalise the experience. Use the panel on the right to choose which questions are asked, or add your own topics.
parentalSetup.customize_questions_desc: All questions are included by default. Toggle any off to skip them, or add your own topics below.
parentalSetup.add_custom_question_desc: Type a topic (e.g. "shoe size", "favorite color") and we'll turn it into a child-friendly question. Custom topics are also shared with your child's friends — so everyone gets to answer them.

errors.fill_required: Please fill out both the name and age.
errors.min_one_question: Please keep at least one question selected.
errors.age_required_for_custom: Please enter the child's age first.
errors.generate_question_failed: Could not generate question. Please try again.

chooseStyle.title: Choose Your World

errors.answer_required: Please answer the question before moving on!

voiceInterview.title: Voice Interview
voiceInterview.subtitle: Talk to our magical assistant to create your avatar!
voiceInterview.guide: Answer the questions out loud. The assistant will guide you!
voiceInterview.ready_subtitle: Make sure your microphone is on and you're in a quiet place.
voiceInterview.generating_subtitle: Generating your avatar based on your answers!

errors.microphone: Failed to start voice interview. Please check microphone permissions.

storyEngine.subtitle: Tell me about a fun time you had with a friend!
storyEngine.story_placeholder: We built a giant pillow fort in the living room...
